agent: Governed-Refactor
description: Run a governed refactor with plan gate and implementation gate.
---

Run a governed refactor for this scope:

$ARGUMENTS

Workflow:
1. Draft scoped refactor plan.
2. Run governance plan review (pre-implementation).
3. Implement only after approval.
4. Run tests and update docs.
5. Run governance implementation review (post-implementation).
6. Close only after all gates pass.
